# 0001 - Record architecture decision template

Date: 2026-05-22
Status: Accepted

## Context
Use this file as the template and starting point for durable architectural decisions in `rezeptbuch`.

Capture decisions that affect the long-term design of the application, such as:
- data model structure
- frontend state management boundaries
- backend route and service organization
- database migration strategy
- Docker topology and environment variable handling

## Decision
Record the chosen option clearly and state why it was selected.

## Consequences
- describe the trade-offs
- describe the implementation impact
- note any follow-up work required

## Alternatives considered
- list the viable alternatives that were rejected

## References
- link the related documentation, implementation plan, issue, or pull request here
